practice.name: A.P.A.W. Veterinary Hospital and Wellness Center
practice.tagline: Compassionate, AAHA-accredited veterinary care in Lanham.
practice.description: A.P.A.W. Veterinary Hospital and Wellness Center is a full-service, privately owned veterinary hospital in Lanham, MD caring for dogs, cats, rabbits, ferrets, reptiles, and pocket pets.
practice.serviceArea: Lanham, MD and Prince George’s County

brand.logoAlt: A.P.A.W. Veterinary Hospital and Wellness Center logo

team.name: Dr. Patricia Peynado-Boyce
team.bio: Privately owns and operates A.P.A.W.; interests include dermatology, internal medicine, and geriatric medicine.

team.name: Dr. Tannis Johnson
team.bio: A Tuskegee-trained general practitioner with special interests in geriatric medicine and dentistry.
